profile.name: Alberto Archetti
profile.title: Postdoctoral Researcher in Artificial Intelligence
profile.tagline: Tabular foundation models · Federated learning · Survival analysis
profile.summary: I am a postdoctoral researcher in artificial intelligence at AIRLab, Politecnico di Milano. My work spans tabular foundation models, federated learning, and survival analysis, with a focus on extracting reliable, privacy-preserving insights from sensitive and distributed healthcare data.
profile.bio: I am fascinated by emerging phenomena — how simple rules give rise to complex behavior, whether in vitro or in silico — and I find the field of artificial intelligence the ideal playground to study them. As a postdoctoral researcher at AIRLab, Politecnico di Milano, I work on tabular foundation models, federated learning, and survival analysis, building models that learn from sensitive, multimodal data — turning scattered information into reliable, trustworthy predictions. I also love teaching and mentoring, and I take part in educational initiatives to promote AI literacy at all levels.
profile.gdpr_authorization: Autorizzo al trattamento dati ai sensi del GDPR 2016/679 del 27 aprile 2016 (Regolamento Europeo relativo alla protezione delle persone fisiche per quanto riguarda il trattamento dei dati personali). Autorizzo la pubblicazione del Curriculum Vitae sul sito istituzionale del Politecnico di Milano (sez. Amministrazione Trasparente) in ottemperanza al D. Lgs n. 33 del 14 marzo 2013 (e s.m.i.).

research_interests.title: Tabular Foundation Models
research_interests.description: Building general-purpose deep learning models for in-context learning on tabular data.

research_interests.title: Survival Analysis
research_interests.description: Predicting time-to-event outcomes for clinical data and financial applications.

research_interests.title: Federated Learning
research_interests.description: Training models across distributed, siloed datasets while preserving privacy.

research_interests.title: Machine Learning for Healthcare
research_interests.description: Applying AI to multimodal healthcare data, with a focus on privacy, interpretability, and reliability.
